info.name: Azure DevOps List work items by IDs

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: ids
params.description: Comma-separated list of work item IDs (up to 200)

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return (e.g., System.Title,System.State)

params.name: asOf
params.description: Work items as of a specific date and time (ISO 8601 format)

params.name: $expand
params.description: Expand relations, links, or fields in the response

items.docs: Returns a list of work items by their IDs. You must provide a comma-separated list of work item IDs. Optionally filter by specific fields, as-of date, or expand relations and links.

info.name: Azure DevOps Create a work item

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: type
params.description: Work item type (e.g., Bug, Task, User Story)

params.name: validateOnly
params.description: Validate the fields without saving the work item

params.name: bypassRules
params.description: Do not enforce the work item type rules on this update

params.name: suppressNotifications
params.description: Do not fire any notifications for this change

items.docs: Creates a new work item of the specified type. The request body must be a JSON Patch document describing the fields to set on the new work item. Common types include Bug, Task, User Story, Feature, and Epic.

info.name: Azure DevOps Get a work item by ID

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: id
params.description: Numeric ID of the work item

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

params.name: asOf
params.description: Work item as of a specific date and time

params.name: $expand
params.description: Expand relations, links, or fields

items.docs: Returns a single work item by its numeric ID. Optionally filter the fields returned, specify a point-in-time with asOf, or expand relations and links.

info.name: Azure DevOps Update a work item

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: id
params.description: Numeric ID of the work item to update

params.name: validateOnly
params.description: Validate fields without saving the work item

params.name: bypassRules
params.description: Do not enforce work item type rules on this update

params.name: suppressNotifications
params.description: Do not fire any notifications for this change

items.docs: Updates an existing work item by applying a JSON Patch document. Supports updating fields, adding relations, and modifying links. Use the add, replace, remove, and test operations to make changes.

info.name: Azure DevOps Delete a work item

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: id
params.description: Numeric ID of the work item to delete

params.name: destroy
params.description: Permanently delete the work item instead of moving to recycle bin

items.docs: Moves a work item to the recycle bin. The work item can be recovered from the recycle bin or permanently deleted. Deletion requires appropriate permissions.

info.name: Azure DevOps Execute a WIQL query

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of results to return

params.name: timePrecision
params.description: Whether or not to use time precision

items.docs: Executes a Work Item Query Language (WIQL) query and returns a list of work item references that match the query criteria. WIQL is a SQL-like language specific to Azure DevOps work item querying.

info.name: Azure DevOps List work item types

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

items.docs: Returns a list of all work item types defined in the project. Work item types include Bug, Task, User Story, Feature, Epic, and any custom types defined in the process template.

info.name: Azure DevOps Get a work item type

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: type
params.description: Name of the work item type

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific work item type, including its fields, transitions, states, and rules. The type name is case-sensitive and must match exactly (e.g., 'Bug', 'Task', 'User Story').

info.name: Azure DevOps List work item fields

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: $expand
params.description: Include additional details such as allowed values

items.docs: Returns a list of all work item fields available in the project. Includes both system fields (System.*) and custom fields, with their types, reference names, and whether they are read-only.

info.name: Azure DevOps Get work item comments

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: id
params.description: Numeric ID of the work item

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of comments to return

params.name: continuationToken
params.description: Continuation token for paging

items.docs: Returns all comments for a specific work item, ordered by creation date. Comments are user-authored notes attached to a work item and are separate from the work item's history.

info.name: Azure DevOps Add a comment to a work item

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: id
params.description: Numeric ID of the work item

items.docs: Adds a new comment to a work item. The comment body supports HTML markup. The new comment is appended to the existing list of comments.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: id
params.description: GUID of the attachment

items.docs: Returns metadata about an attachment by its GUID identifier. The response includes the attachment URL, file name, size, and creation date. Use the URL in the response to download the actual attachment content.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: fileName
params.description: Name of the file being uploaded

params.name: uploadType
params.description: Upload type (simple for files up to 130 MB)

items.docs: Uploads a new attachment and returns the attachment reference including the ID and URL. After uploading, attach the file to a work item using the work item update operation with a relation of type AttachedFile.
